modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Is Trello available in our Teams license?

full_description_text:  
Hey, so I was trying to use Trello in Teams.  
I wanna know if it's part of our Teams license or not.  
Just checking if I can access it.  
Thanks!
